data.title: terraform_data
data.description: built-in resource

data.title: terraform_remote_state
data.description: built-in data-source

data.title: Terraform CLI
data.description: useful terraform cli commands

data.title: Overview
data.description: overview over all commands

data.title: terraform plan
data.description: plan infrastructure with terraform

data.title: terraform apply
data.description: provision infrastructure with terraform

data.title: terraform destroy
data.description: destroy infrastructure with terraform

data.title: terraform force-unlock
data.description: remove a terraform state lock with the CLI

data.title: terraform console
data.description: evaluate expressions against the current state

data.title: terraform console -plan
data.description: evaluate expressions against a planned state

data.title: terraform test
data.description: validate functionality with terraform tests

data.title: terraform state list
data.description: list all resources in the state

data.title: terraform state rm
data.description: remove resources from the state

data.title: terraform state show
data.description: show properties of a resource in the state

data.title: terraform state push
data.description: overwrite the state with a local file

data.title: terraform state pull
data.description: pull the terraform remote state

data.title: terraform workspace
data.description: manage different environments with workspaces

data.title: terraform login
data.description: authenticate to the terraform cloud

data.title: CLI Configuration
data.description: configure the cli

data.title: Functions
data.description: available terraform functions

data.title: tfvarsdecode
data.description: converts content from a .tfvars-file into a valid terraform object.

data.title: tfvarsencode
data.description: converts an object into a string with valid syntax for .tfvars-files

data.title: exprencode
data.description: produces a string containing Terraform language expression syntax.

data.title: abs
data.description: returns the absolute value.

data.title: ceil
data.description: returns the ceiled number.

data.title: floor
data.description: returns the floored number.

data.title: max
data.description: return the maximum number

data.title: min
data.description: return the minimum number.

data.title: parseint
data.description: parses a number for an integer.

data.title: log
data.description: returns the logarithm in a base.

data.title: pow
data.description: raises the number to a power.

data.title: signum
data.description: returns -1/1 representing the sign of a number.

data.title: regex
data.description: returns a substring matching the regex.

data.title: regexall
data.description: returns a list of all regex matches.

data.title: replace
data.description: replaces a string in another string.

data.title: startswith
data.description: checks if a string starts with a prefix.

data.title: endswith
data.description: checks if a string starts with a suffix.

data.title: strcontains
data.description: checks whether a substring is within another string.

data.title: format
data.description: performs string formatting.

data.title: formatlist
data.description: returns a list of formatted string.

data.title: indent
data.description: adds indentations to a string.

data.title: lower
data.description: converts to lowercase.

data.title: upper
data.description: converts to uppercase.

data.title: title
data.description: converts to tilte-case.

data.title: substr
data.description: extracts a substring from a string.

data.title: strrev
data.description: reverses the characters in a string.

data.title: join
data.description: joins a list to a string.

data.title: split
data.description: seperates a string into a list.

data.title: chomp
data.description: removes newline characters at the end of a string.

data.title: trim
data.description: removes charactes at the end of a string.

data.title: trimprefix
data.description: removes from the string.

data.title: trimsuffix
data.description: removes a suffix from the string.

data.title: trimspace
data.description: trim spaces at the start and end of the string.

data.title: length
data.description: determines the length of a collection.

data.title: alltrue
data.description: check if all elements are true.

data.title: anytrue
data.description: check if any element is true.

data.title: contains
data.description: check if a list contains a value. use strcontains() for strings!

data.title: merge
data.description: Merge to maps or objects into one.

data.title: keys
data.description: return all keys as a list.

data.title: values
data.description: return all values as a list.

data.title: zipmap
data.description: create a map from a list of keys and values.

data.title: transpose
data.description: get a new map with the keys and values swapped.

data.title: one
data.description: return the first value or null.

data.title: lookup
data.description: try to get an value from a map.

data.title: coalesce
data.description: returns the first NON-Null value.

data.title: coalescelist
data.description: returns the first NON-Empty list.

data.title: element
data.description: get an element at an index.

data.title: index
data.description: find the index for an element.

data.title: sum
data.description: get the sum of a list of numbers.

data.title: compact
data.description: removes empty string and null values.

data.title: distinct
data.description: removes duplicate values.

data.title: flatten
data.description: flattens any contained lists.

data.title: sort
data.description: sorts a list lexicographically.

data.title: reverse
data.description: reverses a given sequence.

data.title: concat
data.description: combines multiple list into one.

data.title: slice
data.description: extracts some consecutive elements from within a list.

data.title: matchkeys
data.description: generate a subset by matching searched items.

data.title: range
data.description: generate a list of numbers.

data.title: chunklist
data.description: splits a list into even chunks.

data.title: setproduct
data.description: return all combinations of all given values (cartesian product).

data.title: setunion
data.description: Merge all given set into one set with no duplicate values.

data.title: setintersection
data.description: returns set with elements found in all given sets.

data.title: setsubtract
data.description: return all element not found in the second set.

data.title: list
data.description: Depreciated since v0.12, use tolist(list|set)

data.title: map
data.description: Depreciated since v0.12, use tomap(object).

data.title: jsondecode
data.description: converts a JSON-string to an object.

data.title: jsonencode
data.description: converts an object to a JSON-String.

data.title: yamldecode
data.description: converts a YAML-String to an object.

data.title: yamlencode
data.description: converts an object to a YAML-String

data.title: urlencode
data.description: applies URL encoding to a given string.

data.title: csvdecode
data.description: decodes CSV-formatted data.

data.title: base64decode
data.description: converts base64 to a normal string.

data.title: base64encode
data.description: applies Base64 encoding to a string.

data.title: base64gzip
data.description: compresses a string with gzip and then encodes the result in Base64 encoding.

data.title: textdecodebase64
data.description: convert from base64 with a chosen encoding.

data.title: textencodebase64
data.description: convert to base64 with a chosen encoding.

data.title: fileexists
data.description: determines whether a file exists.

data.title: abspath
data.description: convert to an absolute path.

data.title: dirname
data.description: get the directoryname of a path.

data.title: basename
data.description: get the filename of a path.

data.title: pathexpand
data.description: expand a relative path.

data.title: fileset
data.description: get a set of files in a directory.

data.title: file
data.description: reads contents of a file.

data.title: filebase64
data.description: read file contents as a bse64-Encoded string.

data.title: templatefile
data.description: reads a terraform template file.

data.title: templatestring
data.description: reads a terraform template string.

data.title: plantimestamp
data.description: (at terraform plan) returns a UTC timestamp string in RFC 3339.

data.title: timestamp
data.description: (at terraform apply) returns a UTC timestamp string in RFC 3339.

data.title: formatdate
data.description: converts a timestamp into a different time format.

data.title: timeadd
data.description: adds a duration to a timestamp.

data.title: timecmp
data.description: compares two timestamps.

data.title: uuid
data.description: generates a unique identifier string.

data.title: uuidv5
data.description: generates a _name-based_ UUID, as described in also known as a "version 5" UUID.

data.title: bcrypt
data.description: computes a hash of the given string using the Blowfish cipher.

data.title: rsadecrypt
data.description: decrypts an RSA-encrypted ciphertext, returning the corresponding cleartext.

data.title: md5
data.description: computes the MD5 hash of a given string and encodes it with hexadecimal digits.

data.title: filemd5
data.description: is a variant of [`md5`](/terraform/language/functions/md5)

data.title: sha1
data.description: computes the SHA1 hash of a given string and encodes it with hexadecimal digits.

data.title: filesha1
data.description: is a variant of [`sha1`](/terraform/language/functions/sha1)

data.title: sha256
data.description: computes the SHA256 hash of a given string and encodes it with hexadecimal digits.

data.title: base64sha256
data.description: computes the SHA256 hash of a given string and encodes it with Base64.

data.title: filebase64sha256
data.description: is a variant of [`base64sha256`](/terraform/language/functions/base64sha256)

data.title: filesha256
data.description: is a variant of [`sha256`](/terraform/language/functions/sha256)

data.title: base64sha512
data.description: computes the SHA512 hash of a given string and encodes it with Base64.

data.title: filebase64sha512
data.description: is a variant of [`base64sha512`](/terraform/language/functions/base64sha512)

data.title: filesha512
data.description: is a variant of [`sha512`](/terraform/language/functions/sha512)

data.title: sha512
data.description: computes the SHA512 hash of a given string and encodes it with hexadecimal digits.

data.title: cidrhost
data.description: get full ip of a host from a CIDR-Notation.

data.title: cidrsubnet
data.description: get a CIDR-Subnet from a CIDR-Notation.

data.title: cidrsubnets
data.description: get all CIDR-Subnets from a CIDR-Notation.

data.title: cidrnetmask
data.description: get the subnet-mask from a CIDR-Notation.

data.title: type
data.description: Debug command to get type. (Only in Terraform Console)

data.title: can
data.description: Evaluate a given expression.

data.title: try
data.description: Try and fallback on error. (Use lookup, coalesce, can and optionals instead)

data.title: sensitive
data.description: takes any value and returns a copy of it marked so that Terraform will treat it as sensitive.

data.title: issensitive
data.description: takes any value and returns true if terraform treats it as sensitive.

data.title: nonsensitive
data.description: takes a sensitive value and returns a copy of that value with the sensitive marking removed.

data.title: tostring
data.description: converts its argument to a string value.

data.title: tonumber
data.description: converts its argument to a number value.

data.title: tobool
data.description: converts its argument to a boolean value.

data.title: tolist
data.description: converts its argument to a list value.

data.title: toset
data.description: converts its argument to a set value.

data.title: tomap
data.description: converts its argument to a map value.

data.title: Configuration
data.description: terraform configurations

data.title: Terraform-block
data.description: the base building-block for any terraform configuration

data.title: Provider-blocks
data.description: declare and configure providers

data.title: Resource-blocks
data.description: declare and deploy provider resources

data.title: Data-blocks
data.description: get information from existing infrastructure

data.title: Module-blocks
data.description: reuse and structure configurations

data.title: Variable-blocks
data.description: parameterize configurations and modules

data.title: Output-blocks
data.description: declare outputs for configurations and modules

data.title: Local-blocks
data.description: declare and transform values with functions in locals

data.title: Dynamic-Blocks
data.description: dynamically create nested blocks on resources

data.title: Moved-Blocks
data.description: rename and restructure configurations

data.title: Removed-Blocks
data.description: remove resources from state without destroying infrastructure

data.title: Validation-Blocks
data.description: validate variables with custom checks

data.title: Check-Blocks
data.description: validate infrastructure outside of resource lifecycle-blocks

data.title: Import-Blocks
data.description: import existing infrastructure

data.title: Import-Blocks - For Each
data.description: import existing infrastructure with for each loops

data.title: Generate Configuration
data.description: automatically generate configurations from Import-blocks

data.title: Lifecycle
data.description: use lifecycle arguments on resources, such as ignore_changes, etc.

data.title: Lifecycle: Pre- and Postconditions
data.description: validate infrastructure with custom checks

data.title: Lifecycle: ignore_changes
data.description: ignore attributes changed outside of terraform

data.title: Lifecycle: replace_triggered_by
data.description: trigger replacement by attribute or resource changes

data.title: Lifecycle: create_before_destroy
data.description: change order to create new resource before destroy

data.title: Lifecycle: prevent_destroy
data.description: prevent destruction in any case

data.title: Resource Provider
data.description: deploy a resource via a specfic provider

data.title: Module Provider
data.description: override default provider or add more providers on module-call

data.title: Depends on
data.description: make resources *explicitly* dependent on each other

data.title: For Each
data.description: use a map or set to create several instances of a resource, data, module

data.title: Count
data.description: use a number to create n-instances of a resource, data, module

data.title: Backends
data.description: available terraform state backends

data.title: local
data.description: storage the state locally.

data.title: remote
data.description: special backend. (HashiCorp recommends using Terraform Cloud Syntax instead)

data.title: Terraform Cloud
data.description: stores state in the terraform cloud.

data.title: Postgres SQL
data.description: stores the state in a Postgres database version 10 or newer.

data.title: Hashicorp Consul
data.description: stores the state in the Consul KV store at a given path.

data.title: Azure Storage Account
data.description: stores state in a azure storage account.

data.title: Tencent Cloud Object Storage
data.description: stores the state as an object in Tencent Cloud Object Storage (COS).

data.title: Google Cloud Storage
data.description: stores the state as an object in a bucket on Google Cloud Storage (GCS).

data.title: Amazon S3
data.description: stores the state as a given key in a given bucket on Amazon S3.

data.title: Kubernetes Secret
data.description: stores the state in a Kubernetes secret.

data.title: HTTP REST API
data.description: stores the state using a simple REST client. State will be fetched via GET, updated via POST, and purged with DELETE. The method used for updating is configurable.

data.title: Alibaba OSS
data.description: stores the state as a given key in a given bucket on Stores Alibaba Cloud OSS.

data.title: Provisioners
data.description: execute specific actions on a local or remote host

data.title: File Provisioner
data.description: copy file to remote destinations via ssh or winrm

data.title: Local-exec Provisioner
data.description: execute a script/command locally

data.title: Remote-exec Provisioner
data.description: execute a command remotely via ssh or winrm

data.title: Provisioner Syntax
data.description: basic syntax for declaring provisioners

data.title: Provisioner Connections
data.description: required by file and remote-exec provisioners

data.title: Provisioner without a Resource
data.description: execute provisioners without deploying a resource

data.description: basic terraform language components

data.description: variable type constraints syntax

data.description: version constraint syntax

data.description: partially override configurations

data.description: common terraform environment variables

data.description: manage states via workspaces

data.description: string interpolation and heredocs

data.description: var.list[*].id - concise way of accessing list attributes as a list

data.description: transforming lists and maps with a for-Loop

data.description: conditional (ternary) operator

data.description: basic types recognized by terraform
